name: Chocolate Wafer Mix Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Break 8 or 10 cookies into a blender.
2. Process to make fine crumbs.
3. Pour the crumbs into a large bowl and repeat with remaining cookies to make 8 cups of crumbs.
Alternatively, crush cookies using a rolling pin between two sheets of waxed paper or in a plastic bag.
4. Stir in the granulated sugar.
5. Transfer the mixture to a 10-cup container with a tight-fitting lid.
6. Seal the container and label it with the date and contents.
7. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months.
YIELD: About 8-1/2 cups Chocolate Wafer Crust Mix.
